description: Connect billing page to real API, improve all dashboard pages with toast feedback on CRUD operations, add confirmation dialogs for destructive actions, add empty state improvements, and polish the master panel pages.
steps: 1. Refactor src/app/[locale]/(master)/master/billing/page.tsx: Replace hardcoded mock billingHistory and summary with real API calls to /api/master/billing (or /api/master/payments). Add loading states, error handling, and pagination. Use the same pattern as other master pages (apiGet from @/lib/api).

2. Create src/app/api/master/billing/route.ts: API route that fetches real payment records from the database using Prisma. Query the Payment model with company relations, return paginated results and summary stats (total received, pending, failed).

3. Improve src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/products/page.tsx: Add confirmation dialog before delete (use a simple confirm or the Modal component), integrate toast notifications on successful create/edit/delete, improve the empty state with a more inviting illustration-style message.
4. Improve src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/categories/page.tsx: Add confirmation dialog before delete, add toast notifications on CRUD operations, improve animations on card appearance.

5. Improve src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/reservations/page.tsx: Add confirmation before cancel/complete status changes, add toast on status update success, add better visual indicators for today's reservations.

6. Improve src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/customers/page.tsx: Add pagination, add a customer detail modal/expansion showing their order history and loyalty progress, improve the loyalty program card with visual progress toward next level.
acceptance_criteria: Billing page fetches real data from API instead of using hardcoded mock data
API route /api/master/billing exists and queries the database
Products page shows confirmation before delete
All CRUD operations show toast feedback to user
Reservations page confirms before status changes
Customers page shows loyalty progress visually
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit in /projects/sandbox/YUMYLAND to verify TypeScript compiles
Review that new API route follows existing patterns (auth check, Prisma queries, proper error responses)
